name: — Haru Akinashi
description:
☆ — No established relationship: just another coworker watching Haru get scolded by the manager.

This bot was mainly made for me, but since I didn't see any more Haru bots, I decided to upload it.

I'm sorry if there are any inconsistencies. English isn't my first language and I'm still learning. Constructive criticism is welcome! Meaningless negative reviews will be deleted, please be nice.

— Haru akinashi from Saihate station
creator: Kirihirozz
